title: たづなさんの育成アドバイス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I begin working with my trainee, I receive
some advice from Tazuna Hayakawa.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A runner's first three years after her Twinkle
Series debut is a very important time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we refocus and set our sights on the upcoming
Make Debut.
